events.name: He was in Rivoli, near Turin, to recognise the suzerainty of the Holy Roman Emperor, Frederick Barbarossa, for his lands.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guigues V d'Albon於1125年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆沙吉拉波吉達阿爾邦時，他的父親Guigues IV d'Albon31歲，母親Marguerite de Bourgogne26歲。他於1155年與Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1163年7月29日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾維其勒享年38歲，埋葬在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾格雷諾布爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guigues V d'Albon于1125年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆沙吉拉波吉達阿爾邦时，他的父亲Guigues IV d'Albon31岁，母亲Marguerite de Bourgogne26岁。他于1155年与Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1163年7月29日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾維其勒享年38岁，埋葬在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾格雷諾布爾。

nameMeanings.name: d'Albon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire): nickname or habitational name from Norman French Malbanc, which may be from Old French mal banc ‘bad bench’, but if so the reason for the use of this expression as a surname is unknown. Possibly it derives from a lost placename, in which banc may mean ‘steep crag’. The second part of the name, -banc, survives in Maybank , but medieval forms in -ban(e), -bon(e), or -bun are also common and are sometimes later re-interpreted as -born and -bourne, leading to confusion with Melbourne .

variants.name: Mabon
meanings: Scottish: from a Brittonic personal name Mabon or Maban, apparently derivatives of Maponos, the name of an ancient Celtic god.
Possibly also English (of Norman origin): variant of Malbon with loss of -l-.
In some cases possibly also Breton: ultimately of the same origin as the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Maybank
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Malbon  .

en.lifeSummary: When Guigues V d'Albon was born in 1125, in Saint-Rambert-d'Albon, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Guigues IV d'Albon, was 31 and his mother, Marguerite de Bourgogne, was 26. He married Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG in 1155. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 29 July 1163, in Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 38, and was buried in Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guigues V d'Albon est né en 1125, à Saint-Rambert-d'Albon, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guigues IV d'Albon, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Bourgogne, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG en 1155. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 juillet 1163, à Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guigues V d'Albon 1125 in Saint-Rambert-d'Albon, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guigues IV d'Albon 31 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Bourgogne 26. Er hat 1155 Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. Juli 1163 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guigues V d'Albon è nato il nel 1125 nel Saint-Rambert-d'Albon, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Guigues IV d'Albon, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Bourgogne, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG nel 1155. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 29 luglio 1163, nel Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guigues V d'Albonが1125年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスドルoメサイント-ランバート-ド'アルボンで生まれた時，父Guigues IV d'Albonは31歳，母Marguerite de Bourgogneは26歳であった。1155年にBéatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERGと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1163年7月29日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスイスeアヴィズイルで38歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスイスeアグレノブルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guigues V d'Albon(이)가 1125년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 드o 세인트-램버트-드'알본에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guigues IV d'Albon(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Bourgogne(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1155년 Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1163년 7월 29일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 이스e르 비지에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 이스e르 그렌콥일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guigues V d'Albon nasceu em 1125, em Saint-Rambert-d'Albon, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guigues IV d'Albon, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Bourgogne, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG em 1155. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de julho de 1163, em Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guigues V d'Albon родился в 1125 г. в местности сеинт-рэмбирт-д'албон, дрoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Guigues IV d'Albon было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Bourgogne, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG в 1155 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 29 июля 1163 г. в местности визилл, исeр, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности гренобл, исeр, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

sm.from 1142 to 29 July 1162: mai le 1142 e o'o I le 29 Iulai 1162

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guigues V d'Albon nació en 1125, en Saint-Rambert-d'Albon, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guigues IV d'Albon, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Bourgogne, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG en 1155. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 29 de julio de 1163, en Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
